description: Validate the soft-threshold auto-pre-turn path records a skipped memory flush when the model returns no durable content, while compaction still succeeds.
assertions: empty-but-valid memory flush output becomes MemoryFlushResult::Skipped with skip_reason=no_durable_content
skip path remains visible across event, read, reconnect, rollout, and recovery
no daily memory note is written for the skip path
